steps.createNotebook: Notebooks are where your sources, chats, and study tools live. Create your first one.
steps.addSource: Add a PDF, URL, YouTube link, or pasted text. This is the knowledge your AI will work from.
steps.askQuestion: Ask anything about your sources. Answers come with citations.
steps.generateArtifact: Pick any tool and generate your first artifact. We recommend a Report or Flashcards to start.
